title: Practo is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Practo is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Practo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Practo:
Practo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo!
